Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json
with open\('/tmp/scrape_results.json'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

# Check theme-options index for sub-page links in headings
print\("=== Theme Options Index Headings ==="\)
for h in data['theme-options']['Theme Options Index'].get\('headings', []\):
    print\(f"  H{h['level']}: {h['text']}"\)

print\("\\n=== Theme Options Index Paragraphs \(first 10\) ==="\)
for p in data['theme-options']['Theme Options Index'].get\('paragraphs', []\)[:10]:
    print\(f"  {p[:120]}"\)
PYEOF)
Bash(python3 -m pip install --break-system-packages playwright Pillow 2>&1 | tail -3)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import os

# Generate placeholder for menu module
out_dir = 'docs/assets/screenshots/modules/menu'
os.makedirs\(out_dir, exist_ok=True\)

img = Image.new\('RGB', \(1200, 400\), color='#f5f5f5'\)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(img\)

# Draw module name
try:
    font = ImageFont.truetype\('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 48\)
    small_font = ImageFont.truetype\('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 24\)
except:
    font = ImageFont.load_default\(\)
    small_font = font

# Center text
draw.text\(\(600, 160\), 'Menu Module', fill='#666666', font=font, anchor='mm'\)
draw.text\(\(600, 220\), 'Screenshot pending — source documentation unavailable', fill='#999999', font=small_font, anchor='mm'\)

# Draw border
draw.rectangle\([\(2, 2\), \(1197, 397\)], outline='#dddddd', width=2\)

img.save\(f'{out_dir}/overview.png', 'PNG', optimize=True\)
print\(f'Created placeholder: {out_dir}/overview.png'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(sleep 10 && curl -s --max-time 30 "https://www.16wells.dev/module-demos/blurb/" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys
html = sys.stdin.read\(\)
# Check if blurb module is rendered
if 'et_pb_blurb' in html:
    print\('Blurb module IS rendered on the page'\)
elif 'Creative Solutions' in html:
    print\('Content text found but module class missing'\)
else:
    print\('No blurb content found on page'\)
    # Show main content area
    import re
    main = re.search\(r'<article.*?>\(.*?\)</article>', html, re.DOTALL\)
    if main:
        print\('Article content \(first 500\):'\)
        print\(main.group\(1\)[:500]\)
    else:
        print\('No article tag found'\)
        # Show body excerpt
        body = re.search\(r'<body.*?>\(.*?\)</body>', html, re.DOTALL\)
        if body:
            print\('Body excerpt \(first 500\):'\)
            print\(body.group\(1\)[:500]\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s --max-time 30 -u "sshean:KjGF bJG7 CInC aCJp U0BV nOTt" "https://www.16wells.dev/wp-json/wp/v2/pages?parent=10&per_page=100&status=publish" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
pages = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for p in sorted\(pages, key=lambda x: x['title']['rendered']\)[:10]:
    rendered = p['content']['rendered']
    has_module = 'et_pb_' in rendered
    is_empty = len\(rendered.strip\(\)\) < 50
    print\(f'{p[\\"title\\"][\\"rendered\\"]:25s} rendered={len\(rendered\):5d}  has_module={has_module}  empty={is_empty}'\)
" 2>&1)
